calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause was assigned to Dept. 218 on November 18,2002 from Dept. 206 Unlawful Detainer Calendar. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. The Case settled and termm of the agreement were read into the record. Order signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on this dates regularly scheduled calendar. The case was transferred to R00m 620 to be heard by Pro Tem Commissioner: Maria S. Spustek. Clerk;John Stokes.Off- Calendar. Case did not settle.
